issues_fixed.fix: Added type="button" to all range buttons in the map
Added type="button" to toggle button and all interval buttons
Added type="button" to collapse toggle button
Added role="dialog", aria-modal="true", aria-labelledby pointing to h2, focus trap (Tab/Shift+Tab cycle), Escape key close, and auto-focus close button on open
Added role="dialog", aria-modal="true", aria-label="Widget Library", focus trap (Tab/Shift+Tab cycle), Escape key close, and auto-focus close button on open

Removed eslint-disable. Used useRef to capture latest contextType/contextData/clusterId, wrapped askQuestion in useCallback with proper deps. useEffect now includes all deps (open, hasAskedInitial, initialPrompt, askQuestion).
Removed module-level let widgetCounter = 0. Replaced with crypto.randomUUID() to prevent duplicate IDs across hot reloads/SSR restarts.
Replaced 'as Widget[]' and 'as ResponsiveLayouts' casts with runtime type guards (isWidget, isLayoutItem). Malformed server data is now filtered rather than silently corrupting layout state.

Created comprehensive E2E tests for all 3 features: M-P3-002 (Metrics tab + TimeRangeSelector), M-P3-003 (InlineAiTrigger + panel open), M-P3-004 (Customize button + DashboardEditBar + Widget Library)
